name: scope
description: Plan, track, coordinate, and review work with the Scope local-first kanban from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Live kanban planning for Codex work.
interface.longDescription: Scope gives Codex comprehensive project-planning workflows, direct ticket operations, inline board UI, and a sidebar-style workspace view backed by the local Scope CLI and web UI.
defaultPrompt: Plan this work with Scope and keep the tickets updated.
Show me the current Scope board.
Open the Scope sidebar for this repository.
Create Scope stories for this feature and start the first one.
